stageGates.name: format alignment
criteria: timing JSON contains all 11 action IDs for every boss
every action has exactly 4 variants
frame budgets within min/target/max bounds
automatedChecks: schemaVersion must be set and parseable
action set size == 11 and each action has variantCount == 4

stageGates.name: blocking pass
requiredArtifacts: per-boss blocking pose notes for all 11 actions
criteria: each action has clear anticipation + impact + settle pose
no blocked silhouette overlap in intro/peak poses
camera stays in 2.5D isometric envelope
automatedChecks: pose tags {anticipation,impact,settle} exist for each action
camera envelope pitch within -40..-75 and isometric yaw

stageGates.name: timing collision and readability
criteria: pose change density >= 1 major change per 24 frames
idle/move/run keep balance center within ±0.12m
attack tree has explicit recovery frame
automatedChecks: center drift metrics logged per loop action

stageGates.name: blender prep
requiredArtifacts: Blender armature collection + per-boss scene hierarchy
criteria: boss origin at z=0
unit scale consistent
proxy fallback used only when source rig missing
automatedChecks: origin object world.z == 0.0 for all bosses
missing-source-rig decision logged before proxy activation

stageGates.name: animation bake + review
requiredArtifacts: NLA strips per boss/action/variant generated in scene
criteria: NLA strips contiguous and labelled
cross-fade markers exported
frame drift <= 1px over 240px reference
automatedChecks: NLA order and frame continuity check

stageGates.name: fx sync and loop polish
requiredArtifacts: FX trigger pass with impact frame map
criteria: impact peak frames have FX trigger markers
die final hold passes 2 loops without pop
show action exposes boss identity at least once in first 50 frames
automatedChecks: impact markers map to FX timeline channels
die hold continuity check for two-loop playback
identity-readability heuristic on first 50 frames of show

stageGates.name: integration and release
criteria: clips accepted by blend/import pipeline schema check
retarget map present per clip
runtimeEligible flag documented false until runtime mapping complete
automatedChecks: schema validator pass for every clip package
retarget map references bossRigMap and jointAlias
runtimeEligible field exists and is false/explicit
